offer: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inconsistent vehicle maintenance tracking causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide a dedicated tool instead of manual logs and spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance tracking leads to unexpected breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for maintenance records and trip logs
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for maintenance
Enable CSV import for existing maintenance data
Allow one-click export of simple maintenance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
